title: Agent OS Capability Lane
description: A reusable bounded execution path. A lane is COMPLETE only when all six required fields are present; incomplete lanes fail closed.

surfacePattern.description: Exact surface or prefix glob, e.g. google/apps-script/*

receipt.description: How the lane produces/stores its provider receipt.

readback.description: How the lane verifies the effect landed.

redaction.description: What the lane strips before any receipt/state-out.
